ccache /usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/gearboxtest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/gearboxtest.dir/gearboxtest_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gearboxtest.dir/gearboxtest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gearboxtest.dir/__/__/gearbox.cpp.o -o ../../../../unittests/gearboxtest  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alan/Qt/6.8.3/gcc_64/lib /home/alan/Qt/6.8.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Test.so.6.8.3 /home/alan/Qt/6.8.3/gcc_64/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.8.3
